features: Celebrate Milestone Moments: Great for 40th birthdays or anniversaries, the elegant gift bag add a touch of sophistication to any celebration, making your gift stand out.
Premium Quality and Reliable: Made from sturdy materials, these gift bags are durable enough to hold little treasures while maintaining a cheerful look throughout the celebration.
Size: The 28× 20× 10cm gift bag are just the right size for small toys, books, and other birthday gifts, making them ideal for a birthday celebration.
Complete Birthday Gift Packaging Set: The gift bag comes with coordinating ribbon, tissue paper, and card, so you can easily wrap up your gift with minimal effort and maximum impact.
Convenient and Ready to Use: Everything you need for gift-giving is included-simply add your present, tie the ribbon, and your gift is ready to wow the birthday women or men.
description: Product Features: 30th Birthday Gift Bag 30th Paper Gift Bag with Tissue Paper and Greeting Card, Anniversary Gift Bag for Women and Men Specifications: Product Material: Paper Product Size: 32× 23.5 × 11cm/12.6× 9.25× 4.33 Inches, 28× 20× 10cm/11× 7.87× 3.93 inches Product Color: White Package Includes: 1× Gift Bag with Ribbon 3× Black Tissue Paper 1× Card About the Birthday Gift Bag: -Convenient & Ready to Use: Save time and hassle with this all-in-one gift wrapping solution. No need to purchase separate tissue paper or a card. -Elegant and Festive: With a sleek and fun birthday-themed design, this gift bag is perfect for making any birthday celebration memorable.
